title: Data Structures Classification
description: A hierarchical flowchart categorizing common data structures based on their organization and memory representation.
elements: Primitive Data Structures (e.g., int, float, char)
Linear Data Structures (e.g., Array, Linked List, Stack, Queue)
relationships: Primitive structures are the building blocks
Non-Primitive structures are divided into Linear and Non-Linear
Non-Linear structures organize data hierarchically or in a network
Linear structures are further characterized by their memory allocation method
